subcodes.first_line: O pure souls! Verily all nations were awaiting the dawning of the Sun of Truth, each under a different name and title [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نفوس زکیه جمیع ملل منتظر طلوع شمس حقیقت بودند هر یک بلقب و عنوانی قل
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @love and unity, @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all, @spiritual transformation, @predictions and prophecies, @Manifestation of God as sun
